name: Mini Evelyne pony-style calfskin handbag
description:
Hermes Mini Evelyne 16 TPM Biscuit Camel Gold Leather Crossbody Shoulder Bag

********** Hermes **********

Brand: Hermes
Size: TPM 16 (7 inch height x 6.75 inch width x 2 inch depth) - 23" strap drop
Name: Mini Evelyne
Color: Biscuit / Camel
Hardware: Gold
Stamp: K (2025)
Style: Shoulder / Crossbody
Material: Taurillon Clemence Leather
Photos are shot inside a professional light box and outside in natural sunlight to show best color variation between lightings, gorgeous biscuit beige best neutral color Hermes makes for all year round wear. This Evelyne TPM is crafted from biscuit beige bull calfskin clemence leather, featuring gold hardware and dark brown contrast stitching. It has a pull tab top closure and a removable biscuit / camel wooly webb fabric and leather shoulder/crossbody strap. The interior is lined with beige natural suede leather. Origin: France.
